author: doll-agent
content: Added 7 missing dataset generators in generators.rs: make_friedman1/2/3 (regression benchmarks), make_low_rank_matrix, make_spd_matrix, make_sparse_spd_matrix, make_gaussian_quantiles, make_hastie_10_2 (binary benchmark), make_multilabel_classification. All wired in lib.rs. 80 lib tests + 5 api_proof tests pass.
